description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and an open-plan layout. The exterior features a mix of light-colored walls, large glass windows, and brick accents, with a spacious backyard that includes a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a hot tub. The front of the bungalow has a double garage and a driveway, while the interior is organized around a central garden courtyard visible through large windows. The living and dining areas open directly to the outdoor patio, which is equipped with a barbecue and outdoor seating. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall, and the landscaping includes green lawns and hedges. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living with ample natural light and modern amenities.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a central courtyard, and a backyard pool, featuring open-plan living and a double garage.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, hot tub, and outdoor dining area, as well as the open-plan living spaces facing the patio.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the pool area, hot tub, and the rear facade with large windows and patio doors, as well as the boundary wall enclosing the backyard.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the front of the bungalow with the double garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the central courtyard and garden, as well as the main entrance.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the garage, driveway, and the side of the bungalow, showing the connection between the indoor living spaces and the outdoor pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
